# Legacy of Gondolin

> [!abstract] ⚪ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Neutral

*Song.*

---

Attach to a **_Noldor_** hero you control. Limit 1 per hero.
You cannot play allies or attachments from your hand unless you have 2 or fewer cards in your hand.
**Action**: Exhaust Legacy of Gondolin to either draw 1 card or discard Legacy of Gondolin.

**Pack:** [[ALeP - The Glittering Caves]] #110
